name: project-intelligence
description: Source-backed development design plus requirement-level intake, plans, standards, test reports, review gates, finish, maintenance, debugging, and orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Source-backed designs, test reports, review/finish gates, and project context.
interface.longDescription: Project Intelligence generates and validates source-backed Bug and Requirement development designs, maintains repository-local project facts and revisioned requirement archives, and gates implementation through manifest acceptance criteria, test reports, diff-hash-aware reviews, closure summaries, finish, and maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository's standards, knowledge, tooling, and graph context.
Convert this local ticket into a source-backed development design, or implement it through intake, manifest acceptance criteria, RED/GREEN evidence, finish, and maintenance.
Investigate or review this change with project context, hard rules, and quality checks.
